proposition: During the execution window, Melichárek's shareholding records show re-registrations across four companies: Able.cz s.r.o. (20 Jan 2026, cleared by 2 Apr 2026), M&M plan s.r.o. (21 Jan 2026), FaMe logistics s.r.o. (23 Jan 2026) and FaMe trade s.r.o. (26 Jan 2026) — the register-visible footprint of enforcement against his podíly.
shortTitle: During the execution window, Melichárek's shareholding records…
statusExplanation: Přímo doloženo primárním/oficiálním zdrojem (např. přímý výpis rejstříku nebo zakládaná listina).
note: The dated re-registrations are observed in the preserved VR records; the SL69 order names the Able.cz podíl explicitly. Attributing the other three companies' churn to the same case 219 EX 00241/26 is highly consistent in timing but not stated in those records themselves.

sources.title: ARES — official REST API, basic + full public-register (VR) records for all 19 in-scope entities, preserved and hashed
